title: MonteCarloNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-monte-carlo-server (generic Monte Carlo engine: option pricing, pi estimation, queueing, generic integration). The server subscribes to simulate requests under the dd-monte-carlo-server queue group, publishes estimates with confidence intervals plus runtime events. Payloads carry a montecarlo.simulate.v1 schemaVersion envelope and must not contain secrets.

$dd:nats.summary: Monte Carlo estimation request/result pipeline (pricing, pi, queueing).

subjects.name: MonteCarloSimulateRequests
subjects.description: Inbound Monte Carlo simulation requests consumed by the monte-carlo server. Subscribed with the dd-monte-carlo-server queue group so requests load-balance across replicas. Default for MONTE_CARLO_SIMULATE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.montecarlo.simulate.requests

subjects.name: MonteCarloSimulateResults
subjects.description: Monte Carlo estimates (point estimate, standard error, confidence interval, per-experiment summary) emitted by the monte-carlo server. Carries a montecarlo.simulate.v1 envelope. Default for MONTE_CARLO_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.montecarlo.simulate.results

queueGroups.name: MonteCarloServerQueueGroup
queueGroups.description: Shared queue group used by dd-monte-carlo-server replicas consuming simulate requests.
